title: bupleurum corbariense
intro: Bupleurum corbariense, also known as Hare's ear or Chinese thunder of heaven, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bupleurum corbariense include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Bupleurum corbariense is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs like ginseng and licorice root to enhance its medicinal effects.
